summary: Plan-only classification: #83809 and #84237 are both open security-sensitive issue reports involving external or durable user-turn injection into live agent sessions, so Clownfish should route those exact refs to central OpenClaw security handling and perform no close/comment/label/fix action. Hydrated linked context #84113 is already closed and should remain closed as historical context only.

actions.reason: This issue concerns a new external-process path for injecting user input into an active agent session, so it is out of scope for ProjectClownfish backlog cleanup and belongs in central OpenClaw security/product review.

This issue proposes replaying durable local records as user input into an active agent session, so Clownfish should route it to central OpenClaw security handling instead of planning closure or a fix.
No action is available or needed because #84113 is already closed and was only hydrated as linked context.
